purpose: Machine-readable WellFit agent work log for recording completed agent runs, changed files, checks, follow-ups, and the next recommended safe task without creating duplicate architecture or parallel systems.

governance.appendOnlyGuidance: Append a concise entry after each scoped agent run. Do not delete historical entries; mark superseded or corrected entries in a follow-up entry.

taskId.description: Task id from project-register/agent-task-queue.json or a clearly named human-request id.

status.description: Final status for this agent run.

fields.number: Pull request number or null until assigned by hosting provider.
fields.url: Pull request URL or null when unavailable.
fields.title: Pull request title.

items.notes: Short reason for failures, warnings, or skips.

followUps.items: Follow-up tasks, blockers, or review requests created for later agents.

nextRecommendedTask.description: Single safest next task recommendation, preferably from the agent task queue.

updatedTodoFiles.items: TODO/status files whose markers or references were updated.

definitionOfDoneKey.description: Definition-of-done key used for the task.
